faqs.question: How can I get admission at Arena Animation Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Arena Animation Jaipur admissions are merit-based. The institute considers the scores of the candidates in the qualifying exam for admission. Aspirants are shortlisted based on their Class 12 score for BVoc and Class 10 for certificate programmes. Once selected, the institute informs the aspirants about the further process. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: What are the top recruiters at Arena Animation?
faqs.answer: Arena Animation has decent connections with good companies in the industry. Some of the top recruiters at Arena Animation are Technicolor, MPC, Double Negative, Prime Focus, Maya Digital Studios, Red Chillies, Amazon, Rockstar, etc.

faqs.question: How is the life at Arena Animation?
faqs.answer: Arena Animation offers a very creative and innovative environment to students who are seeking career in the field of animation. Students are welcomed enthusiastically as they embark on a new journey in their initial days. The institute offers a variety of courses in the domain of VFX, UI/UX Design, Gaming and many more. However, the most popular programme offered at the Arena Animation Institute is BVoc. It is an UG level programme and has a duration of 3 years. Apart from this, the college provides a safe environment to students with lushy greenery all around the corner. Arena Animation campus has several labs such as 2D and 3D labs, VFX labs, graphics lab, etc.

college_info.intro: Arena Animation courses includes BVoc. To become eligible for admission to the BVoc program at Arena Animation Jaipur, students should have completed Class 12 or an equivalent examination in any stream from a recognized board with a minimum score of 50%. Additionally, the Arena Institute provides certificate and diploma courses. The Arena Animation Jaipur popular programmes are mentioned below:

placements.overview: Arena Animation Institute encourages students to gain practical training and establish networks with companies for job opportunities. Arena Animation Jaipur has successfully placed its students in leading companies such as Technicolor, MPC, Double Negative, Prime Focus, Maya Digital Studios, Red Chillies and Amazon. Students of the Institute are offered top designations of D Junior artist, Junior Asset Artist, 3D Modeler, Former Texture Artist, Matchmove and Rotomation artist. The Institute focuses on real industry knowledge to students for skill development.

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Arena Animation Jaipur strives to provide academic theory and hands-on experience to ensure that all the graduates possess the skills. Provides high-quality learning aids – including books & CDs – to students & faculty. Carries out regular training & certification of teachers to ensure that they can handle even advanced topics.
Supports classroom teaching with assignments, workshops & guided projects. Conducts special events – such as Creative Minds – to encourage student-industry interaction. Experts from the animation industry are invited to speak to students & discuss their questions on a one-on-one basis.

faqs.question: How are the placement of M.Tech in National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, Gorakhpur?

faqs.question: How are M.Tech placements at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Gorakhpur?
faqs.answer: At NIELIT Gorakhpur, the placement rate for M.Tech graduates typically falls between 60% and 70%. review_content.Placements: 85% of students get placed in our course. The highest package offered was 11 lacs, the lowest package offered was 6 lacs, and the average package was 8 lacs. review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of the college. Our department was newly constructed, so labs, classrooms, and the library—everything was good. The Wi-Fi speed was also good. The hostel was also good. Hostel rooms were neat and clean. The food quality of the hostel and canteen was tasty and healthy. Sports grounds were also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Comprehensive college review - Placements, packages, recruiters, and much more.

content.Placements: Placement percentage for popular technical courses is high, often ranging from 70%. Many students in the technical field secure internships during their studies. The lowest package is up to 4 LPA. The highest package is up to 12 LPA. As it's a women's college, many scholarships are provided for higher education.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are equipped with projectors, whiteboards, and seating arrangements. Wi-Fi is set up in labs, library, and hostels. A well-stocked central library is setup. Hostel rooms offer triple sharing with table, chair, bed, and cupboard. The quality of food varies. One canteen is also there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: GWECA - College of Pride.

content.Placements: Last year, there was not much placement due to the recession, but before that, it was more than 90% placement. Last year, there was 100% placement in the Mechanical branch. Companies like TCS, ION, Infosys, Accenture, and American Express visit our college for the placement drive. The highest package till now is 24 LPA, and the average package is 8 LPA. Different roles are being offered, such as SDE, Full-Stack Developer, and Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi everywhere, and labs and classrooms are properly ventilated and clean. The library is the main attraction for students; it is well-maintained and ideal for studying. A digital library is also provided to help students practice better.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it was a good college for me.

content.Placements: 85% of students get placed in our course. The highest package offered was 11 lacs, the lowest package offered was 6 lacs, and the average package was 8 lacs. The top recruiting company was TCS. 70–75% of students get internships from our college at companies like Infosys, TCS, etc. The top roles offered in our course are backend developers.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of the college. Our department was newly constructed, so labs, classrooms, and the library—everything was good. The Wi-Fi speed was also good. The hostel was also good. Hostel rooms were neat and clean. The food quality of the hostel and canteen was tasty and healthy. Sports grounds were also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: College has a team of experienced professors.

content.Placements: At this college, almost all the students get placement opportunities. Around 30-40% of students were successfully placed in our college. Average package offered in our course was between 3-6 LPA. Top recruiters in our course were Sun Pharma, Apollo, CEAT, etc. at our college.
content.Infrastructure: There was average infrastructure at our college. Facilities of the college were also good. Wi-Fi, labs, library, hostel, canteen, etc. for our course. College hostel was also safe for the girls. Mess and canteen food was also good to eat. Sports and other facilities were also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 22 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 4.5 LPA. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are American Express, Paytm, etc. Almost 40% of students got internships in companies like American Express, etc. Top roles offered are frontend developer, backend developer, full stack developer, and database manager.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has labs, a library, Wi-Fi, etc. Medical facilities are not available in our college. The food served in the mess is good. They provide sports and games facilities. Our college has many committees. They conduct activities. Our college has an anti-ragging committee. Our college is ragging-free. The hostel facilities are average. You should go for PG.
